version_description: This tab is for Dynamite. The chords were inspired from "The Groovy Guitar Dude's" YouTube tutorial.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]           [ch]Dsus[/ch]
'Cause ah-ah, I'm in the stars tonight[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]         [ch]Dsus[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire and set the night alight[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]
Shoes on, get up in the morn'[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Cup of milk, let's rock and roll[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]Em[/ch]
King Kong, kick the drum[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A7[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Rolling on like a Rolling Stone[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]             [ch]Em[/ch]
Sing song when I'm walking home[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A7[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Jump up to the top, LeBron[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                [ch]Em7[/ch]
Ding-dong, call me on my phone[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]A7[/ch]                [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Ice tea and a game of ping pong[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]
This is getting heavy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Can you hear the bass boom? I'm ready[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Life is sweet as honey[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Yeah, this beat cha-ching like money[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Disco overload, I'm into that, I'm good to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'm diamond, you know I glow up[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Hey, so let's go[/tab]


[Verse 2] [RM, j-hope2]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]           [ch]Dsus[/ch]
'Cause ah-ah, I'm in the stars tonight[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]           [ch]Dsus[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire and set the night alight (Hey)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Shining through the city with a little funk and soul[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]
So I'ma light it up like dynamite, woah[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]                 [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Bring a friend, join the crowd, whoever wanna come along[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]                   [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Word up, talk the talk, just move like we off the wall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]               [ch]Em7[/ch]                 [ch]A7[/ch]                    [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Day or night, the sky's alight, so we dance to the break of dawn[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                   [ch]Em7[/ch]                   [ch]A7[/ch]                             [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Ladies and gentlemen, I got the medicine so you should keep ya eyes on the ball, huh[/tab]


[Verse 4]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]
This is getting heavy[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Can you hear the bass boom? I'm ready (Woo-hoo)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]              [ch]Em7[/ch]
Life is sweet as honey[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A7[/ch]                  [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Yeah, this beat cha-ching like money[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]           [ch]A7[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Disco overload, I'm into that, I'm good to go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]             [ch]Em7[/ch]
I'm diamond and you know I glow up[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]Dsus[/ch]
       Let's go[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]           [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]Dsus[/ch]
'Cause ah-ah, I'm in the stars tonight[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm7[/ch]       [ch]Em7[/ch]             [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]
So watch me bring the fire and set the night alight (Hey)[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]              [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Shining through the city with a little funk and soul[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Light it up like dynamite, woah[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Dyn-n-n-n-na-na-na, life is dynamite[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]   [ch]Em7[/ch]       [ch]A7[/ch]          [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Dyn-n-n-n-na-na-na, life is dynamite[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm7[/ch]                 [ch]Em7[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]             [ch]Dsus[/ch]
Shining through the city with a little funk and soul[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]      [ch]Em7[/ch]     [ch]A7[/ch]           [ch]Dsus[/ch]
So I'ma light it up like dynamite, woah[/tab]

Dyn-n-n-n-na-na-na, ayy[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]               [ch]Dsus[/ch]

[Choru]
